learned_lessons: Commander: The algorithm exits at an Ollama exit (97% PPO hold), which means the trader is exiting at a high risk position.

Maintain high confidence in your risk management strategies and consider trailing stops strategically.
Commander: - Trailing stop is a common strategy for closing trades when price is near the previous close. - Low volume trading often correlates with profit opportunities.
